Relaxing Instrumental Music | 174Hz Sarangi Raga Darbari | Theta Wave Calm Session | 1 Hour

description:
When anxiety rises, your nervous system needs grounding more than reasoning. This is grounding.

One unbroken hour of bowed sarangi (vocal-like Indian string instrument) playing Raga Darbari, tuned to 174Hz healing frequency, with a subliminal Theta wave layer for nervous system grounding.

No mid-roll ads. No interruptions. Just music.

⏱ Best for:
• Anxiety relief
• Nervous system grounding
• Pre-sleep calm
• Panic prevention
tags: relaxing instrumental music, sarangi, sarangi music, sarangi meditation, bowed indian instrument, 174Hz music, 174Hz, Theta waves, Theta wave music, raga darbari, darbari raga, calm music, relaxing music, ambient music, background music, meditation music, indian classical music, instrumental music, 1 hour sarangi music, indian classical sarangi, theta wave meditation, raga focus
suno_prompt: Raga Darbari sarangi, deep meditation, ambient Indian classical, tanpura drone, vocal-like phrases with long bow sustains, expressive meend slides, gamak vibrato, 55 BPM, theta wave undercurrent, no percussion, no rhythm, transcendent and contemplative, warm low-frequency hum, seamless loop, instrumental only, solo sarangi with tanpura, late night mood, deeply calming, no abrupt changes
thumbnail_prompt: [TODO: thumbnail image prompt — calibration pending] problem=relaxing instrumental music, instrument=Sarangi, raga=Darbari, wave=Theta

production_spec.suno_prompt: Raga Darbari sarangi, deep meditation, ambient Indian classical, tanpura drone, vocal-like phrases with long bow sustains, expressive meend slides, gamak vibrato, 55 BPM, theta wave undercurrent, no percussion, no rhythm, transcendent and contemplative, warm low-frequency hum, seamless loop, instrumental only, solo sarangi with tanpura, late night mood, deeply calming, no abrupt changes
production_spec.suno_strategy: Custom mode → paste prompt → style: Ambient → generate 2 songs → pick better → click Extend 3-4× to reach ~10-12 min. Generate a second seed with same prompt → extend → ~10 min. Total: ~20 min source. Loop in post to fill 60 min.
suno_critical_tips: Use Custom mode (not simple) so the full prompt is honored
Style: Ambient (best for raga + drone combos)
Generate 6-8 versions, use only the best 2-3
Use 'Extend' for continuity across the source
If Suno adds vocals despite prompt: regenerate (don't add 'no vocals' — it sometimes triggers them)

drone.instrument: Tanpura tuned to root of Raga Darbari

production_spec.merge_pattern: ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -i thumbnail.png -i final_audio.wav -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -preset medium -c:a aac -b:a 320k -ar 48000 -pix_fmt yuv420p -t 3600 -movflags +faststart output.mp4
